listing_name: Live in a Work of Art!
description:
Live in a Work of Art! Enjoy eclectic period decor, with all the modern amenities. A beautiful 10 minute walk to downtown, restaurants, grocery stores, bike and walking trails, and all the vibrant culture that Asheville has to offer.
Feel free to contact with any questions about dates, or anything else, before booking!

The space
This home is a sanctuary –– furnished with fine artwork and antiques, a piano in excellent playing condition, claw foot tub, wood stove, three queen memory foam beds, beautiful front porch, deck, side yard and more. It's an oasis of calm, located just minutes away from everything you need. The perfect base for a retreat, and/or adventures in the Asheville area!

Guest access
You will have access to the entire house, and as much privacy as you desire! Amenities include Dishwasher, Washer and Dryer, Coffee Maker, Espresso Machine, Vitamix Blender, Ice-Cream Maker, Microwave, Claw Foot Tub, Wood Stove, Professional Piano... Large Porch and Deck, Outdoor Tables and Hammock, and so much more! Please note that there is NO TV set, as most people prefer to use their laptops. The Wifi is super fast for Netflix and streaming TV on all your devices. But with so much to do, see and taste in Asheville, watching TV is the last thing you'll want to do!

Other things to note
Pets are welcome... Please let us know how many you are bringing when you make the reservation. There is a small pet fee, to compensate our cleaners for the extra time and products required to remove pet fur and odors. Please be honest... We will notice pets coming and going! :)

I recommend keeping your pets crated if appropriate, and bring them with you when you go out... Asheville is a very dog-friendly town! Please be sure to clean up after them during your stay, since we have only a short window of time to make the house beautiful for the next guests. Any damages beyond the usual cleaning will be deducted from the security deposit.

Keep in mind that this is an older, historic home... The house is professionally cleaned between each guest, but if you want a place without a speck of dust, or the scent of antique wood and furnishings, you may want to consider a brand-new hotel room. But then you'd be missing out on all the charm and character that only a period home can provide!

listing_name: Comfy Asheville Cottage with Private Fenced Yard
description:
This is a clean modern cottage in a quiet natural setting, good for couples, families or small reunions. Built in 2017, this comfy house has fast wifi with dog-friendly, fully-fenced lot. Located 6 min. to downtown West Asheville, 12 min. to downtown Asheville and Biltmore Estate. Close to Bob Lewis Sports Park, NC Arboretum, Blue Ridge Parkway, Tanger outlets, Buncombe County Sports Park, WNC Farmers Market, I-40 and I-26. Full kitchen, washer/dryer, a/c, sleeps up to 5.

The space
The cottage is quiet and mostly secluded, yet only minutes to eclectic West Asheville (Uber $10 and up), and downtown AVL (Uber $15 and up). It has a vaulted ceiling in the kitchen/living room and lots of natural light. Dedicated high-speed wifi is available throughout the house. The two bedrooms have memory foam queen-sized mattresses, and the second bedroom includes a half bunk with a twin.

The fully fenced yard is spacious and sunny, about one quarter acre in size. The kitchen is fully equipped for cooking at home. Flat screen TV includes a Roku and guests can access their own subscribed streaming services. Covered porch has chairs and is big enough for relaxing in the evenings or out of the sun.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire 780 square foot cottage along with a .25 acre fenced in yard. A hall closet with supplies for the maid is locked.

Other things to note
Stand-alone short term rentals are not allowed in Asheville city limits. We are just outside of the city (by a few feet!), so our rental is 100% legit.

The gravel parking lot can hold up to 3 cars. If you need more space for your vehicles, let us know and we will find more space on our property. Do not park in the grassy yard as this can leave ruts and may collapse the septic system.

We can accept no more than 2 dogs at any time. Your dog should be on flea and tick medication. If you bring a dog, please try your best keep him/her off of the furniture and beds. Bring your own dog sheets if your pet is going to get on furniture.

We will charge extra to remove dog hair from blankets and sheets. No cats allowed, no exceptions.

Note that the fence around the yard is only 4' high and large dogs may be able to clamber over. You are responsible for your dog at all times.

listing_name: Downtown Oasis on Forsythe (NO Cleaning fee)
description:
Our quiet, comfortable, basement apartment is walkable to downtown Asheville, Montford, UNCA, nightlife, public transit, city center, Harrah’s Cherokee Center and parks. Grove Park Inn is a mile and a half if you're up for the walk or it is an easy drive. You’ll love the neighborhood and ease of access to downtown, breweries, Biltmore Estate, Grove Park Inn, hiking, biking, and all things outdoors. Great rental for couples, families (with kids), or solo adventurers. Come see for yourself!

The space
You will enter this downtown oasis via a private entrance and driveway off Forsythe St with 3 off street parking spaces in your private drive. You'll walk into a great space that's flowy, open and flexible to meet all of your needs. You'll be greeted by a kitchenette complete with sink, refrigerator, microwave, toaster oven, keurig and water machine. There’s a dining table for 4 with additional pull out seating in the kitchenette. In the kitchenette you will also find a keurig coffee maker with a variety of k cups (coffee and tea), sweeteners, Starbucks flavor shots and cream. One of our guests highlights is our adventure wall, providing guests with brochures, menus, and everything you’ll need for your mountain adventure. Connected to the kitchenette area, you’ll find the living area, comprised of a sofa sleeper and three chairs, ottoman and electric fireplace. Entertainment includes a smart TV with YouTubeTV. There are board games, books, and magazines to enjoy if you decide to have a night in. The first bedroom is comfortably situated beyond the living area, divided by a room divider for ease of access to the TV for those who enjoy TV while falling asleep. The bedroom has a spacious area comprised of a king sized bed with ottoman for luggage, chair, and closet. The second bedroom is comprised of two twin beds and a crib (available if needed). Sleep, read, play games, hang out, or whatever suits your needs. It’s a perfect spot for kids if you’re bringing them along. Next to the twin bedroom, you'll find a bath complete with sink, toilet and shower (no bathtub). Additionally, there is an outdoor space where you can sit and catch up while watching a lovely sunset over an ice cold beer, glass of wine or start your day with a cup of coffee and great conversation.

Guest access
You will have full access to the bottom floor of our house with the exception of our garage.

listing_name: Cedar Cabin | Screened in Deck | Quiet | Downtown
description:
Relax at our modern, rustic chic, cedar cabin just 2 miles from downtown Asheville. Floor-to-ceiling windows bring the forest indoors while vaulted wood ceilings, rustic charm, and thoughtful design create a warm, open feel. Relax by the fireplace, on the screened porch, or dine outside under the trees. Quiet, private, and well-stocked for a restorative stay.

The space
Designed for rest and reconnection, this standalone cedar cabin blends rustic charm with modern comfort. Tucked in a quiet wooded neighborhood just 2 miles from downtown Asheville, it’s ideal for couples, families, or a creative escape.

Inside, you’ll find vaulted ceilings, floor-to-ceiling windows, and cozy forest views. Relax on the screened-in porch, dine outdoors, or curl up by the gas fireplace after a day of hiking or brewery hopping!

Highlights:

Private 2BR/1BA cabin (King, Queen, Queen pullout sofa)

Vaulted wood ceilings + large windows

Screened porch + covered outdoor dining

Wood Stove + strong Wi-Fi

Full kitchen w/ essentials, linens, washer/dryer

Quiet, safe neighborhood w/ off-street parking

Central heat + AC

Just 2 miles to downtown, 10 mins to Biltmore, close to Blue Ridge Parkway

23 mins to AVL Airport | Uber & Lyft friendly

Not pet-friendly

Book your Asheville getaway and enjoy quiet comfort, modern design, and natural surroundings — all just minutes from town.

Guest access
Guests have full access to the entire home, including all living spaces, bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen, laundry, and private back deck. Enjoy hassle-free self check-in with a smart lock, and easy parking in the driveway or right out front. The home is yours to relax, recharge, and enjoy—make yourself at home!

Other things to note
This cabin is located in a quiet, residential neighborhood where wildlife is part of the charm—it’s not uncommon to see bears passing through, especially around trash bins. Please secure all food and waste, and enjoy wildlife from a safe distance. We also ask guests to be mindful of volume, especially outdoors, to respect the peaceful setting and our neighbors.

listing_name: Garden Oasis with Serene Mountain View Downtown!
description:
Beautiful custom built space!! Tastefully decorated, first class accommodations on the mountain overlooking Asheville. WE CLEAN COVID CLEAN, leaving the space feeling fresh and inviting for each guest! Exposed rock wall opposite original outside wall; just a couple of the details that give this listing a unique and comfortable feel. Beautiful mountain views above with city lights below. This charming space is a short five minutes from downtown Asheville yet feels worlds away.

The space
We now have a GERM GUARDIAN air purifier helping to kill airborne viruses, bacteria and mold spores, amongst other things! I couldn’t be happier. We ventilate the space before, during, and after cleaning. We clean and disinfect all surfaces, paying special attention to frequently touched surfaces. We vacuum and mop the floors. Shower mats are washed between guests. We have always taken pride in the way that we clean and have further enhanced such cleaning because we want you to feel safe to relax and enjoy your stay with us! This beautiful customized studio is adorned with a wood slab bathroom vanity and office space, a unique rock wall and original outside wood wall. Creative touches throughout the space. Both charming and classy. Super clean with a big bathroom! The kitchenette has everything you could need to feel at home when you're away from home, including a beautiful customized concrete countertop. It is equipped with a small refrigerator, hot plate, toaster oven, microwave and a coffee maker (coffee and creamer also provided). Hulu streaming is available and will be logged in via Roku and mounted flat screen TV. You are welcome to choose from a variety of other streaming channels to log in with your own personal account. Just don’t forget to log out! What else could you need?! :) Plenty of privacy with a separate entrance. Beautiful French doors let in lots of light and allow guests to enjoy the fresh air on nice days. Outside space with table and chairs for guests to relax the day away. Lots of space on this double lot on our small mountain leaves you feeling away from it all even though you're merely minutes from downtown. We are super convenient to grocery stores and tons of restaurants downtown. Porch swing and other outside seating. Beautiful fire pit area available for guest use. Suitable for two adults; children are welcome as well although the space is not child proof and I don't have separate sleeping arrangements.

This space is one of two rentals on the lower level of my home. Each rental has a private entrance on either side of the house and my entrance is at the front of the house so privacy coming and going is not an issue. If this space does not fulfill your needs please check out my other Airbnb.

I will send instructions when it gets close to your reservation. Please read them carefully to be sure you choose the correct apartment upon arrival.

Guest access
A new lounge recently opened at the bottom of our little mountain! It has a super cool vibe with a good atmosphere, small bites, and a food truck all within a 15 minute walk from our home.

The house is just a 2 minute walk to historic Helens Bridge!!

“The city drops away quickly as you drive up Beaucatcher Mountain from downtown Asheville. College Street—a main thoroughfare through the heart of downtown Asheville, forming one side of Pack Square next to the haunted Art Deco imminence of Asheville City Hall—suddenly becomes a mountain road as it dizzily traverses the side of the mountain. The road enters a gap in the mountain spanned by a lonely, primeval bridge. You have arrived at Helen’s Bridge.”

Quoted from the online southern spirit guide

Other things to note
Well-mannered, house-broken dogs are more than welcome but please no rambunctious and aggressive dogs. The pet fee is $10 per pet per night. No cats in the studio please, due to other guest allergies.

listing_name: Historic Home Near Downtown Asheville Pvt Bed/Bath
description:
Spacious light filled private room with private bath across the hall in my home, a 1912 Arts and Crafts house, in the historic Grove Park neighborhood. Within walking distance (30 minute walk), an easy drive or quick Uber to the heart of Downtown. Also very close by is the Grove Park Inn, UNC-A, Asheville Yoga Center, 2 parks, several neighborhood restaurants, a beer & wine store, and great local ice cream shop. Three grocery stores within a mile. Two blocks from public transit.

The space
Upstairs bedroom with a new queen mattress on a slated frame and a XL twin couch.
There is a crib for parents traveling with an infant in an adjacent room.
Private bathroom across the hall has the original clawfoot tub with a shower and sink with separate hot and cold faucets. Beautiful wrap around porch to relax with your morning coffee or a book and afternoon cup of tea. My house does not have central air but does have A/C window units in the bedrooms for your comfort. The house is on the main entry street for the Grove Park neighborhood so you may hear street noise. There is a sound machine in the closet for your use.

Guest access
Guest have access to private bedroom, private hall bath and front porch. There is also a dedicated shelf in the refrigerator for your use. If you would like to use any of the other Kitchen appliances let me know in advance and I'll see what I can do to work something out.

During your stay
This is my home, I live here, and I am very happy to share a bedroom and bath with my guest. I will respect your privacy while you are here. I am on the go and very active so may not be around when you come and go. I am an avid hiker and happy to suggest beautiful hikes nearby.

Other things to note
My home is over 100 years old and has lots of character along with a few quirks and signs of its age. The house features certainly suit the era it was built. The bedroom is upstairs and on the front of the house so THERE MAY BE STREET NOISE. I do have a sound machine in the room. listing_name: Charland Chalet - Family Friendly Guesthouse
description:
Please read the entire listing to ensure you enjoy your stay :)

This listing is our stylish, family friendly apartment with separate entrance in the bottom half of our home. The apartment sleeps 2 people comfortably and there is room to sleep 4. We are 2 minutes to the Blue Ridge Parkway entrance that takes you to many hikes and waterfalls and no more than 10 minutes to the Biltmore and all that Asheville has to offer!

The space
We are seasoned Airbnb Superhosts renting the downstairs apartment in our mountain home. Professionally decorated with a well-stocked kitchenette, washer/dryer, and room to sleep your whole group but feels luxurious for just two!

The sleeping arrangements include a king bed, a twin sized daybed in the living room with a trundle. Air mattresses are available as well upon request.

The kitchenette should have everything you need to cook basic meals including pans, a double hotplate, full fridge, microwave, air fryer, cutting board & knives, hot water kettle, plates, cups, and utensils. There is a coffee maker and we provide coffee, powdered creamer and sugar. We also provide a grinder if you prefer to bring your own coffee! There is a Dunkin and Starbucks just a few minutes away in addition to all of Asheville's amazing local coffee. The only other thing you should bring is any food you would want during your stay which you can get at the Ingles less than a mile from our house!

There is no cable television, but the tv’s in the space are ready for any streaming log in.

Guest access
Your apartment with dining room, bedroom, kitchen, living room, bathroom, laundry room, backyard and your own private back deck!

Because we have kids ourselves, we keep the cabinet stocked with games and activities for all ages! We also have a trampoline that can be used upon request along with anything else you might need.

Other things to note
We own outdoor cats and one dog that you might see walking in, but you are on your own HVAC unit and animals are never allowed in the unit under any circumstances. We host a guest regularly with severe allergies that has no trouble in the space.

listing_name: Unique Private Spot - Historic Home & Neighborhood
description:
Welcome! Antiques + International + Funky AVL + Art + Comfort + Local tips = Your Spot to explore Asheville from historic Montford in a 120-year-old home. Private, sunny, 650 square-foot space. Relax and experience local living. Walking distance to downtown, the botanical garden and greenway. Filled with charm. Off-street parking and private deck. Enjoy a drink, meal or good book indoors or out. Relax, play, work or plan your next adventure. Celebrate something special. Rest well.

The space
This private space includes a private deck, sunny kitchen, living room, bedroom, bathroom and laundry. Hardwood floors, oriental rugs, antiques and art throughout the space add to the charm of the 120-year-old house as it combines the best of old and new.

There are nine windows. Shades in every room ensure that all can be covered for privacy or open for natural light. Heating and air conditioning can be independently controlled in the kitchen, living room and bedroom to ensure your comfort.

The kitchen includes a sink, refrigerator, range, microwave, toaster oven + kitchen ware. Dine or enjoy a drink indoors or out. The living room is spacious with a couch, comfy chair, antique secretary/desk, a spinning wheel from the late 1800s and a honky-tonk piano about that old. The bedroom with a Queen bed is made for comfort and restful sleep, has authentic French Provincial furniture.

The bathroom has a walk-in shower. There is a squeegee hanging in the shower and a couple of swipes on the door before you open it will help the bathmat stay dry. Towels + shampoo, etc. are provided. There is a washer and dryer and a variety of detergents are provided. There's an antique dressing table in the bathroom, a magnifying mirror and several different types of lotion for your use.

Enjoy the backyard and sounds of nature on the deck. You can walk to restaurants in Montford and enjoy our historic architecture or the greenway. If you want to plug in, wifi is on a 5G network. I connect globally for work on a regular basis and it is reliable. A portable speaker enables you to have music anywhere you like.

Off street parking is available for small and mid-size vehicles. Larger trucks or SUV's can park easily on the street just behind the house and walk up the driveway. Please note that the drive is a gradual incline. When parked beside the deck it's about 30 paces to the gate and there are two steps to access. There are no additional steps in the space.

The apartment is an official, permitted Homestay with the city of Asheville having met all requirements including a site inspection.

About a 15-minute walk to downtown, and 1 minute away from from the greenway and new tennis/pickle ball and basketball courts. Great dining options for dinner or a wonderful breakfast or lunch are a 5-10 minute walk from the house.

Guest access
Midsize vehicles have easy off-street parking just steps away from the outdoor deck entrance. Please note that the drive is a slight incline. With only two steps up and you're in with nothing more to navigate. Large trucks or SUV's enjoy street parking with just a brief walk up the slight incline of the drive to the deck entrance. There is easy access to Lyft or Uber if you choose not to drive. The house is approximately 1.25 miles to the heart of downtown.

Other things to note
Asheville is known for its scenic beauty, abundance of opportunities to enjoy the outdoors, fantastic restaurants supplied with locally grown food, craft beer and eclectic sights and sounds. Great boutique shopping and local music and art offer plenty to do if you prefer to stay in town. We are also friendly in the best of the tradition of Southern hospitality.

listing_name: Modern Mtn Cottage | Pets OK (+ fee) | 10 Min DTWN
description:
Discover mountain seclusion with city convenience! This private, lower-level suite features a separate entrance and designated parking. We live upstairs if you need us, but the downstairs apartment is completely yours. Enjoy a quiet retreat that puts the area's best right at your fingertips:

• 10 mins to Downtown Asheville
• 9 mins to the Biltmore Estate
• 4 mins to the Blue Ridge Parkway

We are proudly pet-friendly! Bring your furry friends to enjoy the fresh mountain air ($50 per pet).

The space
We’ve poured a lot of love into fully updating this home, inside and out! With beautiful new European windows bringing in plenty of natural light (and with blackout shades for making sleeping in easy!), the entire space feels bright, modern, and brand new.

The downstairs apartment features:

2 Bedrooms & 1 Full Bathroom: Comfortably appointed for a restful stay.

Full Kitchen: Complete with a stove, dishwasher, and everything you need to cook at home.

Custom Climate Control: A ductless mini-split system allows you to set the perfect temperature in each individual room.

Living Area: Kick back and relax with an Amazon Fire Stick and complimentary Netflix.

Two Outdoor Spaces: Grill out on the covered patio, or unwind under the stars around the gas fire table on the second stone patio.

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire separate downstairs apartment.

description:
This charming 1917 Arts and Crafts home is conveniently located at the heart of it all.
The house is situated in a historical neighborhood with views of an organic garden and mountains. It's also just a very short 5 minute walk to Downtown West Asheville for breweries, restaurants and shops.

The space
My earthly home has lush plants, gorgeous woodwork, beautiful antiques, and European charm. There is a lovely wrap around deck and huge garden to lounge about.

Large open workspace is available in the dining room. Parking is free and right next to the entrance.

Have comfort in knowing I invite and support cultural diversity and am welcoming to all couples.

Please, Please; familiarize yourself with the listing, its description and house rules for import details and to ensure the best stay possible.

An earlier check in is usually available but you will need to request at least a day prior so I can accommodate.
Bag drop off is available in most situations but please ask ahead of time so I can accommodate

Living room

Grill

I am a former B&B concierge so know how to provide guests with assistance and recommendations.

listing_name: The Red Rooster Bungalow
description:
Super comfy house lots of space, close to everything Asheville has to offer. West Ashville, the river arts district, Biltmore Est. Mountains water falls are just minutes away. Walk , bike or drive to restaurants and parks like Malvern hills with a tennis courts and a play scape for kids Walk the green belts starting at Hominy Creek and to the French broad parks and check out The River Arts district with studio tours brewery's New Belgium Brewing Company and great Barbeque. Check out 12 Bones.

The space
This brick bungalow is warm and comfortable with lots of space. You have the whole house Upstairs to yourselves 1450 sq ft with plenty of space to spread out. One room has a nice queen bed in a room with charm. The other room has two single beds and is full of light and looking out into the courtyard. Plus the office futon can be set up as a bed. A large full kitchen is supplied with coffee and light snacks. We provide coffee pods for the Keurig and filters for the coffee maker pots and pans and some light snacks to help with the hangries. The dinning area is also a great place to hangout, with a large table. Living room has TV with a Fire TV and basic cable a soundbar and a Bluetooth enabled stereo are all for your enjoyment.

Guest access
You have the whole upstairs, I have an seperate entrance and do not engage with you unless you ask, the front porch and the courtyard plus a large parking area or a turn about to yourselves. With complete kitchen, four burner range and oven pots and pans, with full size fridge, toaster, microwave, coffee maker and a Korig with some coffee provide a blender a second two burner induction stove top and a large size toaster oven with convection and a set of plates and glasses utensil's for your convenience. There is a dinning room with a large table to spread out and work on a project or eat a meal. Full living room with 65 in HDMI smart TV with Fire TV so you can access movie channels and other programming through the TV. Also a extra room that can be an office or bed room kids play room or changing baby area, with its own TV or monitor(hook up your lap top) plus a futon that can be a bed with foam topper, High speed WiFi throughout the house.

Other things to note
There is access to the down stairs from a seperate entrance and in the back is my studio were I spend most of my time. I ask that you leave these spaces to me and text me if you need anything. Sometimes my hands are full of art and I can not come to the phone right away. Outdoor smoking only.

listing_name: Convenient + modern spot:  central North Asheville
description:
Accommodations are suitable for a single person or couple visiting Asheville for vacationing pleasure, business or both. Located in a quiet neighborhood less than 4 miles from downtown and there is access to the Blue Ridge Parkway without a single traffic light. Private and secure entry is separate from main home. Spacious living room with fireplace and streaming TV for lounging. Kitchenette with self serve coffee, microwave and minifridge. Parking is easy and only steps away from the door.

The space
The custom woodwork throughout the house was a collaborative design between owner and craftsman. Using locally sourced materials for cabinets; and urban reclaimed hardwood lumber for furnishings, doors and original paneling, all uniquely designed with a handcrafted touch.

Guest access
Guest parking is convenient and directly in front of home or on gravel parking pad. A door from bedroom leading to storage room remains closed and locked. Another door leading from kitchenette to storage room also remains closed and locked.

Other things to note
Please do not leave open neither the refrigerator door, nor the freezer compartment small door which swings outwards. There are labels on the front of each door to remind you to close both of them. If they are not closed, the refrigerator ices over and it is a difficult cleaning task taking into consideration the care it requires without piercing the refrigerator liner. If this occurs and it is discovered upon your departure, you will be assessed a $25 additional cleaning fee. Please do not let this happen - I sincerely do not want you to have to pay this fee!

The fireplace is for seasonal usage. From May 15 - September 15, the fireplace is decommissioned. When the fireplace is in use, if a guest's consumption is greater than 5% of the propane tank's capacity, a fee will be assessed according to the before and after documentation of a guest's usage. Rates are controlled by the propane provider and generally, the rate is $4/gallon.

DOWNSTAIRS

- Bunk bed nook with trundle and large tv with amazon fire stick

UPSTAIRS

Guest access

You have about 180 square feet under roof that includes a private bathroom along with additional covered outdoor living space for relaxing. The fire pit area is a shared space for all guests to enjoy. There is a small refrigerator, coffee maker, toaster over, & microwave in the Acorn as well as dishes, etc. so you are able to prepare some meals. Smart TV for Netflix & a few channels.

The space

listing_name: 2 mi to downtown & Biltmore Estate. Pet friendly!
description:
Spacious 1800 sf. house. ****LONG TERM DISCOUNT*** It includes master suite with king size bed, full bathroom with jetted tub, large shower and walk in closet. Room #2 has 2 twin size beds. Bathroom #2 has a tub/shower. There is one large sofa, 1 queen/2 twin airbeds. Guests have access to their own private driveway for up to 6 small cars. (Hosts live in lower-level).

$100 pet fee - 2 dogs max.

The space
Our house is quite unique because of its strategic location within 2 miles from downtown and Biltmore Estate. Everything is a short drive and Uber is about $12 dollars per ride to downtown. Easy access to River Art District, Grove Park Inn, Breweries, West Asheville restaurants, mall, antique shops and much more.
The hosts reside on the lower level of the property with their own private parking and entrance. There is a door at the top of the stairs that connects these two spaces that remains securely locked at all times to ensure the privacy of our guests. There is an added sound barrier in the stair-well to alleviate any sound pass-through as well.

Guest access
The one story house is safe for kids and senior guests without worrying about stairs and safety gates. The entire house is light, bright, peaceful and private. Enjoy the large open-concept that joins the living room, dining room, and kitchen . The living room offers multiple sitting areas , a 55\ flat-screen Roku TV * NO cable service* and two big windows to enjoy the natural sunlight. The dining room sits 6 people at the table and 3 at the bar. Guest can feel at home with access to a fully loaded and bright kitchen - new stainless steel appliances

listing_name: The In-Between:Private small house between N&W Avl
description:
Convenient rental in Northwest Asheville (in-between North and West Asheville). Close to river, downtown, West Asheville, River Arts District, Richmond Hill Park, Biltmore, UNCA. Easy access to all the area's best restaurants, breweries, tours, nature, and attractions. Studio-style, 640 sq. ft, 2 story, 1 bed upstairs, 1 bath upstairs, and 2 air mattresses available on request. Small kitchenette. Fantastic back porch for relaxing. Private driveway and private feel. Mountain views.

The space
The In-Between is a 640 square foot dedicated vacation rental. We live next door, but we believe in the need for a private retreat. You'll have your own private driveway, privacy fencing, and full use of the rental house. We are on call if you need us for any reason, and are happy to answer any questions about the accommodations or the area--otherwise, we will leave you to your peace.
There's a city bus stop right across the street, but more often we use Uber or Lyft since it's pretty cheap and only a few minutes drive downtown.
The neighborhood sits right up the mountainside above the French Broad River, and has beautiful mountain views.
PLEASE NOTE: This is not a boutique hotel in the middle of downtown; it is a quaint little house in a natural setting, with a gravel driveway and plenty of local flora and fauna. While we are only 3 miles from downtown central Asheville and 2 miles from downtown West Asheville, this is NOT a walking-friendly neighborhood; it is up-and-coming and will be several more years before that is the case. We try to make everything as awesome as we can for you, and to keep our prices comparatively affordable. Please respect the space and contact us through the Airbnb app if you have any questions or concerns.

Guest access
The entire house, backyard, and driveway are all yours.

Other things to note
The house can sleep up to 4 people, keeping in mind that the bed setup is 1 queen bed upstairs, and 2 air mattresses that you can place upstairs or downstairs. The house is open-layout studio style, meaning there are no closed-off sleeping spaces--PLEASE keep this in mind. Despite the size, it feels spacious and open.

listing_name: Private Suite, private entry.
description:
Water is now safe. Please visit and help rebuild AVL!

Comfy couch, new linens and fluffy towels.

Close to the breweries, restaurants, entertainment, and minutes from the Blue Ridge Parkway. 8- 10 minute Uber to downtown.

You'll have a private entrance to the lower level of this north Asheville home. 2.9 miles to downtown, 0.4 miles to beautiful Beaver Lake, 1 mile to Grove Park Inn. Several excellent restaurants within 1 mile.

You’ll have privacy and quiet, & off street parking.

The space
This space has a separate ventilation system from main house. As a medical professional with 28 years experience, we have been sanitizing hard surfaces, handles, and remotes, and washing all linen in hot water since before Covid-19 as part of our regular cleaning routine. We take pride in providing an extremely clean space for you.

This is the entire lower level of our home and the door to our living space upstairs will remain locked on both sides for your privacy.

We strive to reproduce the feeling of a luxury hotel suite-a comfortable queen Casper Cool Max mattress with luxury linens, down pillows and comforter, cozy blankets, turkish cotton towels, robes, and slippers create a relaxing atmosphere for your stay.

The space has lots of natural light, and all interior lights have dimmers.

Want to sleep late? There are blackout curtains for that.

A comfortable couch and stylish swivel barrel chairs in the sitting room are a great place to enjoy your coffee while planning your day, or to have a glass of wine or beer while unwinding. There is a mini fridge, and a Keurig with complimentary coffees and teas, cream and sugar. A small microwave is available.

In the spa type bathroom you’ll find a heated tile floor, Italian tile, rainhead shower head as well as hand held wand, cruelty free aromatherapy soaps, shampoo and conditioner. There is a hair dryer and magnifying mirror.

Extra pillows, blankets, and a box fan are provided for your comfort.

Guest access
When your reservation is confirmed, you'll be given your own code to the private entrance. This code is changed for every guest. You'll have off street parking.

Other things to note
-Guests must be 21 years of age
-No illegal activity or illegal drugs are permitted on premises.
-Please be respectful of noise levels after 10:00pm
-Please turn off lights and lower heat/ac as appropriate when you go out
-This property is on a private golf course, and there are sounds associated with that.
-We have a dog. While I take pride in the cleanliness of the guest space and attempt to keep our fur babies from entering the space, occasionally there is a sneak. Please be aware if you are highly allergic.
-We use security cameras outside to alert us when a car pulls into the driveway. There are no cameras inside the guest space.
-Access to W/D
-Professional Dohm white noise machine for light sleepers or those who like white noise.
-Box fan in bedroom closet for your use
-Hotel type safe to secure your belongings if desired.
-Owner is not responsible or liable for any accidents, injuries or illness that occur while on the premises. The homeowner is not responsible for the loss of personal belongings or valuables of the guest. We cannot be responsible for any items left behind.

listing_name: Montford  Charmer Walk to Downtown Asheville
description:
Historic Montford Neighborhood Vintage Gem: charming private 2BR apt w/ private entrance. 10 min walk downtown! Fully stocked kitchen. 2 televisions have basic cable package through spectrum app as well as Hulu and Netflix.  Super easy to add your own streaming app as well.

The space
Welcome to our 102+-year-old vintage gem, just a 10-minute walk to downtown.

This charming apartment blends historic character with modern updates, making it the perfect spot to explore the area while enjoying a cozy place to land.

The neighborhood also houses restaurants (Nine Mile. Tall Johns, and All Day Darling) and the Asheville Visitor Center. 2 parks with tennis courts and pickleball are close by, too.

The Space
The home is over a century old, and part of the kitchen and full bed area was thoughtfully converted from what was once a covered porch. Because of the home’s age, there is a slight slant in the flooring in that section. We like to think of it as part of the original character, but do keep an eye on your step.

Please note: you walk through the second bedroom to access the kitchen.

Sleeping Arrangements
• Front bedroom: King bed + single futon
• Living room: Futon that folds out into a full bed
• Rear bedroom (off the kitchen): Full bed

There are two TVs, one in the king bedroom and one in the living room.

Kitchen & Amenities
The kitchen includes:
• Full-size refrigerator
• Stove
• Coffee pot
• Keurig (bring your favorite K-cups)
• Electric kettle

For safety, the apartment is equipped with smoke and carbon monoxide detectors.

Comfort & Convenience
• New heating and air system to keep you comfortable year-round
• On-demand hot water heater (let the water run for about a minute when first turned on)
• Washer and dryer on site (not inside the unit)

If you’re looking for historic charm, walkability to downtown, and comfortable sleeping space for a group, this spot checks all the boxes. Enjoy your stay!

Guest access
Enter through a door on the front porch, there is a staircase that leads you to your private, 2nd floor apartment.

Other things to note
Owner James lives on first floor in separate apartment.

listing_name: Asheville: A Stamp of Approval
description:
Private room w/ private bath.
My home is in an ideal location for reaching everything Asheville has to offer. Just minutes away from downtown, breweries, shopping, restaurants, music, hiking trails, Blue Ridge Parkway, Biltmore Estate, & more.
Charming two story cape cod. The upstairs of my home is your private retreat featuring a large bedroom with queen bed, in room sitting area, private full bathroom. Natural light abounds. Clean & bright. Covered porches. Large yard w/ mature trees.

The space
Welcome to A Stamp Of Approval. Your home away from home during your stay in Asheville! Enjoy full privacy on the second level of my home. Full size bathroom and spacious bedroom with in-room sitting area are yours for resting, relaxing and recharging. Ceiling fan. Lots of natural light. Windows provide views of my lawn and tree adorned front and back yards.
Comfortable queen size sleigh bed with nice quality linens. Two large chest of drawers and two closets provide ample storage. The dormer window alcove adds a fun architectural flare to the room and a sweet reading nook with books to choose from. Decor is soothing and an interesting and eclectic blend of uniquely postal themed items representing my almost 40 years as a mail carrier.
The bathroom is fresh and clean with peaceful, spa color inspired walls. Plush towels. Basic toiletries are provided including a hair dryer.
Coffee, tea, and snacks are just a few feet away from your bedroom door with a Keurig coffee making station. Coffee and teas provided. Plentiful visitor information about Asheville and the surrounding area with maps, brochures and a hiking guide to share. Bottled water and welcome snacks are here on your arrival.
Free WIFI
*My home has been approved by the City of Asheville as a home stay residence.

Guest access
In addition to guest room and guest bathroom, you are welcome to use common areas of my home including the living room, dining area, and kitchen (microwave, stove, and refrigerator). My front porch is a great outdoor space that guests enjoy. There is a shelf available in my refrigerator for your drinks or other perishable items during your stay.
* With prior host approval: guests may have use of a wood burning fire pit in back yard...think s'mores! Laundry area (including iron and ironing board).

During your stay
Rest assured your privacy and your space will be respected during your stay. I enjoy meeting and interacting with my guests if they desire that as well. I will be happy to share my love for this city with you in suggestions/recommendations for entertainment, the food scene, outdoor adventures and more. Sue will also be on hand to help with recommendations on things to do in Asheville. If I' m not at home and you need to reach me, a text message or a quick phone call will put us in touch. I will be quick to respond and answer any questions or address any concerns you might have. I have one sweet indoor cat, Lilith, that you might catch a glimpse of during your stay.

listing_name: Our serene cabin in the woods
description:
Our private cabin in the woods is in a secluded, quiet mountain community. It shares over an acre of land with our primary residence, wild turkeys, and an occasional bear. Just 15 minutes from downtown Asheville, the famous Biltmore Estate, and craft breweries galore! The Blue Ridge Parkway is 7 minutes away, offering beautiful scenery, waterfalls, and wildlife. Lots of hiking, jogging, and biking trails. Warren Wilson College is within two miles. Perfect location any time of the year!

The space
Our cabin is privately located down a path leading away from our primary residence. There are numerous stairs leading from the parking area down to the cabin. The cabin is surrounded with trees so waking up to the sound of birds and squirrels is such a delight. Wood floors and walls make the cabin cozy and a screened in porch where you can drink your morning coffee or evening glass of wine is so enjoyable! There is a queen sized bed, dining table for two, plus a futon upstairs and full bath and kitchenette downstairs. The kitchen is equipped with a refrigerator and sink. There is also a microwave, toaster, electric grill, keurig, instant pot, dishes, and silverware if you are inclined to cook. There is no stove top available. We have a large grill on our deck for your use anytime. Just let us know beforehand. Provided are snacks, breakfast bars, coffee, tea, bagels, and water. The bathroom has a full shower and bathtub with extra towels and toiletries provided. Washing machine and dryer are available for a small fee if clothes need to be laundered. These are located in our house. The air conditioning and heat unit is a new Mitsubishi split level, which we find very efficient. WIFI is available. You can either stay and read or meditate in the peacefulness of the cabin, set out and hike the many trails around the area, or explore the delicious restaurants in downtown Asheville. There is so much to do!!!!!!

Guest access
The entire cabin is accessible to our guests.

Other things to note
There are stairs leading down from the parking area and a path that leads from our residence over to the cabion. There is no stovetop in the kitchen. Kitchen is equipped with a refrigerator, sink, Keurig, toaster, microwave. Snacks, fruit, water, and breakfast bars are provided.
Shampoo, conditioner, soap, hair dryer and towels are always on hand. Uber services available.
This is a peaceful community so no loud noise or music is permitted.

Looking for a smaller place for two just down the road from here? Check out our new sister property at https://airbnb.com/h/cozy-cottage-asheville

listing_name: Craftsman Historic Home in River Arts District
description:
Private entrance to upper floor of Historic Craftsman home in the River Arts District.

Walk along the river or to many local restaurants, art galleries & breweries. Lots of character in this old home with modern amenities. Each room has a shower & bathroom attached. The room has a sofa, table, mini-fridge, & third bathroom with claw-foot tub.

This 1907 home was completely renovated in 2004. Dark wood, picture frame molding, a beautiful staircase, and original tub make your stay unique.

The space
Once the parsonage to the church next door, it is said that Rockafeller himself paid for the once slate roof to be replaced.

This is a beautiful historic home in the neighborhood of Chicken Hill, names for the hatchery that was once in the neighborhood.

Each room has a decorative fireplace and private ensuite bathroom. Once a guest house for local artists of High Water Clays, the tile work around the old fireplaces and in the bathrooms was completed after the renovation.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire upstairs of the house. There are two fully appointed rooms with Jameson mattresses and fresh linens — both with a private ensuite bathroom with shower.

Each room has locked access.

There is also a third room that has a sofa, table, mini-fridge, and bathroom with a claw-foot soaking tub.

listing_name: West AVL Garden Apartment
description:
This separate apartment with private entry is located in a quiet neighborhood and is minutes from Downtown (<10), River Arts District (<10), Biltmore Estate (20ish), and Blue Ridge Parkway (20-30). Shopping, eating, hiking, camping, zip-lining, river sports at your fingertips! Have mobile massage therapist and extra room ready for your relaxation. This a perfect spot for travel nurses and your three month contract or you and a friend coming to explore Asheville. Come enjoy!

The space
This space is calm, relaxing, and whatever you need it to be.
The kitchenette is equipped with microwave, toaster oven, refrigerator, induction burner, hot plate, and all cooking and eating utensils.
There is a mobile computer desk in the bedroom closet for anyone that needs to work from “home.”
There is a smart tv in the living area. There are some apps available or feel free to login your own.
There have been extra cleaning procedures added to the routine to ensure all surfaces are ready for you, the next guest!
Reservations after 10pm are not available. I might be asleep. 😆😴

Guest access
After finding the address, instructions are as followed. Please park on the parking pad farthest left of the light pole and mailboxes (not the driveway.) Either side of that pad is fine. Walk towards the deck with the tricycle hanging under. Follow stepping stones to your apartment. A motion light will guide you after dark. You'll find your key in the combo lock box to the right of the door. The combo code will be given the day of arrival. You can hang onto the key during your stay. Please help yourself to coffee and tea. There are extra toiletries in the bathroom cabinet if you’ve forgotten something. You should be able to find everything you need. If that's not so, please don't hesitate to ask. I work nights, but should always be able to check my phone. Enjoy your stay!

Other things to note
If you forgot any toiletries, look under the bathroom cabinet.
Stays that exceed 2 weeks, the cleaning fee will be $100 instead of $65.
Paper products normally won’t be replaced during stays longer than 3 days.
The air mattress is in the bedroom closet with sheets, comforter, and pillows. Also, there are two heaters and a fan for any temperature adjustments and an iron and board in the bedroom closet.

listing_name: PRIVATE & Cozy Guest House-Easy Access to Downtown
description:
Our detached, private, guest house is located on the SE side of Asheville! Easy/Quick access to all of the action and fun Asheville has to offer. We are located near I-40 with an approximate 10 minute/3 mile drive to the Biltmore Estate main entrance or the Blue Ridge Parkway (2.7 miles) and about 13 minute drive to downtown Asheville. Please be aware you will need to climb one flight of stairs to access the unit.

The space
**NO check out duties!!** Our place is great for the solo traveler, friends catching up, or a couple looking for relaxation or local adventure. Although the space is located over a garage we are using that area for personal storage so you will not experience any noise from a car cranking or garage door opener operating early in the morning from underneath. The unit has a full size bathroom with shower/tub and kitchenette for your convenience. Experience city conveniences, easy access, and relaxing evenings! Our kitchenette has a small toaster over/griddle/coffee maker appliance with coffee/tea/hot cocoa provided along with breakfast and granola bars. Chilled bottled water will be awaiting you in the refrigerator. Clean dishes and silverware are available for your use as well. Shampoo, conditioner, and body wash are provided and 100% vegan.

Guest access
Our space is immediately adjacent to our home and you are welcome to park on the paved driveway during your stay. Access is via a single flight of stairs to the private entrance using a keypad in which the code is changed after each stay. We have a sitting bench and small pebble patio in the back yard if you wish to enjoy the cool evening air.

Other things to note
We occasionally have one night availability due to longer reservations book ending a day or mid-winter season. Smoking inside the apartment is NOT allowed, please step outside, the ground level patio is available if you wish. Pets are also NOT allowed out of consideration of all guests who may have allergy concerns.

listing_name: Stunning Long Range Mountain Views - 4 BR & 3 BA!
description:
Come enjoy the mountains! Located in a location that allows you to truly soak in the mountains without leaving the property.

Comfortably furnished mountain home with 20-mile mountain range views from each room. The main floor is an open concept so that you can hang out in the kitchen.

Four miles to Blue Ridge Parkway, 15 minutes to the Biltmore Estate and 14 minutes to Downtown Asheville. Situated on a private three-acre tract of the forest so you will feel like you're a part of nature.

The space
This is a home with an open concept on the main floor. It is located in a location that allows you to truly soak in the mountains without leaving the property.

Enjoy the modern kitchen and prepare a meal with the whole group or take advantage of the many take-out services that are currently offered by local restaurants. Take in the breathtaking mountain views from the central living space through the elegant French doors and large windows or step onto the covered back porch. From there soak in the southern mountain life while relaxing in the wooden rocking chairs with your favorite beverage.

The living room has a decorative only fireplace and a wood-burning fire pit outdoors with plenty of seating. The dining room has a table large enough for ten people and there are four stools at the kitchen counter.

There are two master bedrooms on the main floor and two upstairs. The loft upstairs has a TV in the den with plenty of seating for the whole gang. All bedrooms have TVs including in the living room and upstairs den. The house offers three full bathrooms - One shared upstairs and one each in the two masters on the main floor.

The driveway is gravel with five parking spots and two above at the roadside.

Notes asked by other guests:
** Only one step up to the front porch then the main floor is one level with two bedrooms/baths. If stairs are an issue.

1. The drive up is a steady climb on paved and part packed dirt road
2. Two king bedrooms with bathrooms on the main floor, two bedrooms upstairs
3. Hairdryers in bathrooms
4. Only three miles to Ingles Grocery store
5. Seven miles to Downtown Asheville, pending destination
6. Ten miles to Biltmore Estate and village
7. WIFI speed 225 download and 11 uploads. This does vary on the device.
8. TVs in all bedrooms, and living room/den

Guest access
Experience our ongoing commitment to providing you an unforgettable experience at our vacation homes. We have 14 years of ★★★★★ Five-Star reviews (currently found here as well as on other listing sites as this particular property is new to Airbnb).

Upon your confirmed reservation a hospitality app link will be sent to you. Your app will give you the address, check-in/check-out instructions, door entry codes, wifi codes, house and property information as well as local suggestions of things to experience.

We also provide you with a written house manual upon arrival. The house manual contains all of the details and features of the house/property, local maps, local suggestions, and things to experience while you’re in the area.

Other things to note
The gravel road is meticulously maintained, is not steep and no four wheel drive is necessary. Please SLOW DOWN and respect our friendly neighbors. Thank you!

House elevation is 2,388 feet.

listing_name: Modern Mountain Retreat in North Asheville
description:
Beautifully furnished, modern apartment in the mountains with spacious private deck overlooking quiet woods. Less than 2 miles to the Blue Ridge Parkway access point at Craven Gap, 3.5 miles to Merrimon Avenue and Fresh Market/Ingles; 6 miles to the heart of downtown. Easy access to all the area's best restaurants, breweries, hikes and attractions. Studio-style, 325 sq. ft apartment with kitchen, bathroom & washer/dryer.

The space
This is a dedicated guest space with separate stone stairway entrance (guest parking is at the bottom of the stairway), keypad-access entrance, large private deck and separate climate-control. You control the temperature in your space.

The kitchen is equipped with a refrigerator, microwave, drip coffee-maker and French Press, 2-burner stovetop and all basic kitchen supplies. The dishes are vintage brown hull pottery and clear glassware-- beautiful to use and enjoy on the deck for any meal. There is also a kitchen table for a workspace or dining indoors.

There is a washer/dryer for your sole use in the bathroom, which also features a walk-in shower with marble walls. There is a hairdryer, iron, small ironing board and folding clothes-drying rack for your use in the apartment. A rack on which to hang your clothes is available upon request.

The bed is Queen-size and there are extra blankets for your use. There is a flat-screen TV with wifi and Roku which you may use with your own Netflix, Hulu, Amazon, etc log-in if you have an account. The wireless router is located immediately above the apartment for the strongest possible signal.

The apartment is located on the bottom floor of our home and is a \daylight basement\" with windows on the front and side wall. Draw the curtains for total privacy or to sleep in

The road in front of the house is normally very quiet-- take a right and it's less than 2 miles up a gravel road to the Blue Ridge Parkway access point at Craven Gap. Take a left at the end of the driveway and the road immediately turns to pavement and it's 3.5 miles to the Ingles Supermarket

listing_name: North Asheville Cottage Retreat
description:
Enjoy morning coffee on the balcony, and wine + cheese on the porch at sunset. Relax in a light-filled cottage with everything you'll need for a peaceful visit. The studio cottage is in a lovely neighborhood, only a 5-minute drive to lively downtown Asheville.

This well-equipped studio has high-speed wifi, a smart TV w/several streaming services, full kitchen, very comfortable queen bed with high-quality linens. There's a separate entrance, off-street parking, and your own washer + dryer.

The space
Renovated cottage in quiet neighborhood in North Asheville. Great neighborhood restaurants and walkable to downtown. Vinnie's, Zen Sushi, Avenue M, Little D's to name just a few, are minutes away. The Grove Park Inn is a terrific walk anytime of year, but especially in fall to sit on porch and in winter to warm by huge fire(URL HIDDEN) Cottage is nicely decorated and care taken for comfort, needs, and style.

A separate entrance with code for security and off street parking makes for a feeling of privacy and safety. The parking space under cottage is only for cottage but is not large enough for oversized vehicles or vans. High fence and gate codes make for extra feeling of privacy and security.

Sweet cottage with touch of elegance. High speed internet, flat screen TV for movies, fully furnished kitchen with granite counter, and a bathroom with fun, retro tiles, and marble sink. Floors are redone to preserve the beautiful effects of aging. The balcony on one side was made by a local artisan in French style with Fleur de Lis. A covered porch and deck is on the other side where you can sit outside rain or shine, day or night(URL HIDDEN)

This is a great vacation cottage that would allow you ample time to really experience the liveliness of Asheville; music, art, amazing food that is very diverse and affordable. Whisper quiet air conditioning and heating.

I have an allergy to pet dander and have strict no pet policy.

Please note: due to Hurricane Helene, we and the rest of Asheville have water but not yet potable water. The water is perfectly safe for showering and dishwashing etc, and we’re using bottled water for drinking.

Guest access
The cottage has everything you'll need: towels, linens, fully-equipped kitchen. But if there's anything additional, please let me know. There's a separate washer + dryer only cottage guests use, and their own private porch and balcony. I rarely use the back yard, which is front yard of cottage.

Other things to note
Please note that folks with problems with mobility and balance would probably have difficulty with stone steps up to cottage.

The parking under cottage is designated for guests only. Since most neighbors don't have garages, parking in front of their houses is not available.

2 blocks from award winning restaurants & coffee houses, local shops, breweries and music venues.

listing_name: Walk to downtown Asheville, private studio suite
description:
You’ll love staying in our cozy above-garage studio during your stay in Asheville! Can only except reservations for 2 ppl. We are less than a mile from downtown and only blocks away from coffee shops (Owl Bakery, City Bakery, Liberty House & Starbucks), plenty of restaurants (Jettie Rae’s Oyster House, Taco Temple, Bone & Broth), ice cream (Ultimate) and exercise studios (Asheville Yoga Center &SOR). We are also only a few miles from the iconic Grove Park Inn. Uber downtown approx. $9 per ride.

The space
Our house sits on a quiet street in a historic Asheville neighborhood. Our above garage studio is a 350 sq. foot private space with its own entrance from the main house that Marc and I live in. The keypad entry makes life a bit easier because you don't have to keep up with a set of keys :) There is a comfortable queen sized bed with an additional pull out sofa bed (size full). Studio includes microwave, refrigerator, coffeepot, utensils, dinnerware and other useful accessories (but not a full kitchen with sink or stove). Due to the size of our studio, we also do not have a dining area/coffee table. There are many windows allowing plenty of sunshine, bird listening and mountain breezes. In the studio you will also find a binder including more thorough information on local restaurants, activities, landmarks, the must-see sites, advice and emergency contact information. We also have a flat screen television with YouTubeTV and off street parking.

Guest access
Your suite is private with its own entrance and stairway leading upstairs however please note it is attached to our main house. There is an inside door that remains locked at all times. We do not share each others spaces, therefore do not provide washer/dryer, full kitchen or share porch. If you need anything though, please ask, and we will do our best to help.

Other things to note
***Please note***
Hurricane Helene devastated Asheville and many surrounding areas in Western North Carolina in September 2024. As a community, we are slowly but surely recovering and rebuilding. We are happily welcoming guests back at our AirBnB in 2025 and hope you’ll find the magic in the mountains and happiness in our city that we love so much. We can’t thank you enough for supporting us all during this time. Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns regarding the hurricane aftermath.

description:
This lovely AirBnB apartment boasts 900+ square feet of space and is located just steps away from the Grove Park Inn. Only 2 miles from downtown Asheville, it sits on a private lot, in a quiet neighborhood. Enjoy beautiful mountain views and sunsets through wall of windows in living area, or relaxing on your patio. Large ensuite bedroom, full kitchen, (no range), expansive family room with additional sleeping options - designed and accessorized to meet your needs. All are welcome!

The space
Clean, accommodating, spacious and relaxing - designed to be your home away from home. Inside you have separate kitchen, living area, and bedroom. Outside is your private patio where you can enjoy morning coffee or watch the sunset with a glass of wine or local craft beer.

Kitchen was installed in 2017 with toaster oven, microwave, full-size refrigerator, dishwasher, coffee pot, electric teapot, electric frying pan, Breville oven, Instapot and blender. My husband and I live upstairs, but privacy is complete with your own entrance.

Guest access
You will share the drive with us, which easily has parking for two extra cars. There is a gentle slope with gravel steps down to your private entrance. Hand rail and lighting line the walkway.

Other things to note
Even though we live very near downtown, GPS gets confused and will take you past our home. It will get you close, but please follow the directions that we will send to you once you’ve made your reservation, to ensure an easy arrival.

Also, we do own pets, a dog and cat, who live upstairs. They are rarely in the apartment between guest visits, so you may want to take this into consideration. Both are friendly and entertaining.

listing_name: Stay in a Charming Suite in an Asheville Bungalow
description:
Sleep tight in a private Queen Bedroom with adjacent, private bath in an owner occupied home, situated in a tranquil neighborhood in East Asheville.
Shared, common spaces have a relaxing, laid back vibe.
The house is in the charming neighborhood of Oakley, minutes from Biltmore Village and Biltmore Estate, and within 10 minutes of downtown Asheville. The area is a quiet enclave, close to hiking, breweries, downtown shopping, and amazing dining.
We are located 20 minutes from the airport.

The space
Your private room and bathroom are on the main floor or our home, and allow you full access to our shared living area and front porch so if you like total privacy, this might not be your vibe. The room includes a coffee/tea/wine bar, and your own t.v., if you prefer more privacy. Your private bath has a claw foot tub.
We are close to the public bus stops. We are also easily accessible to the local Uber and Lyft drivers in the area.

During your stay
We both work from home, so are available most of the time. While we are happy to socialize, we let our guests have as much privacy as they prefer.

Other things to note
Access to the lower level of the home and the back yard area are not offered to our guests, as it is our private space.

listing_name: Garden Cottage 2.5 miles to downtown
description:
This mountain cottage is conveniently located 2.5 miles from downtown Asheville and 4 miles from the Blue Ridge Parkway offering guests the best of both worlds...a retreat in the heart of the mountains yet convenient to all that Asheville has to offer. This well loved and maintained cottage is beautifully furnished and offers two bedrooms with queen sized beds; two full bathrooms; twin sized pull out sofa; and an open living dining area with a wood stove; central heat and AC and ceiling fans.

The space
Sliding glass doors open to a wrap around deck where you can enjoy your morning coffee while planning your day. The house sits at the end of a private gravel road and shares a cul de sac with only one other house. There are a few other homes located along the road leading to the cottage. In the fall and winter you can easily see mountain ridges as the house is tucked in between several ridges. The house and neighborhood are quiet and private making you feel you are deep in the mountains even though it is a short trip to town. There are great views overlooking downtown Asheville on the drive to and from the cottage. Parking area includes a one car garage with additional private parking adjacent to the house. Next to the parking area is a wood shed that will be well stocked for your use.

Guest access
The house and yard are all yours! Self check in is easy with the key code lock box on the front door. Feel free to take walks along the gravel road and in the surrounding neighborhoods....there are great views along the way. The neighbors are friendly and will be happy to point you in the right direction.

Other things to note
In the Asheville downtown area you will find dining options from fine dining to local options that define the feel of the Asheville foodie culture. Within the area you will find over 15 craft breweries; local cider houses as well as wine bars to help you unwind in your time here.
If you are a music lover you will be well entertained with music venues of all sizes offering nationally know acts as well as local favorites. Shoppers will love the walkable specialty shops, local boutiques and the amazingly wide array of art galleries and street performers. Asheville is Mecca for yoga enthusiasts and is also filled with many spas and skilled bodywork therapists to help heal and restore your body.
For the nature lovers seeking adventure the Blue Ridge Parkway is only 4 miles away and offers vast scenic views with memorable hiking and road biking. Also located in the Asheville area you can enjoy tubing down the French Broad River while viewing the Biltmore Estate. Rafting and kayaking opportunities are available for all levels within the area. Mountain biking enthusiasts of all levels will love the vast trail systems close by. Whatever your interests are, the location of this cottage offers you the opportunity to indulge yourself, even if you are looking for a place to hunker down by a fire and relax in the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains.

listing_name: The Little Red Porch
description:
The Little Red Porch - A private retreat in the beautiful mountains of peaceful East Asheville. We welcome people from all backgrounds, cultures and beliefs to our home, hoping to share Asheville, NC-- a wonderful, magical place--with as many as folks as possible. And we LOVE having KIDS stay with us! Please take a look at our bright, cozy apartment and see if we look right for you.

The space
Our place is conveniently located in a quiet neighborhood 8 minutes from the heart of downtown and under 20 minutes from about everywhere else. We are super close to I-40, I-240, and the Blue Ridge Parkway, and about 7 minutes from I-26. West Asheville, The Biltmore House, Black Mountain, and the River Arts District are all 10 minutes away.

The apartment consists of a common room with a daybed and trundle providing two single beds. The bedroom has a king size bed, and the television set. Note: those sleeping in the common room have to pass through the bedroom to get to the bathroom.

The entire apartment is beautifully decorated with clever artwork by a talented local artist. The entire space is newly remodeled with new appliances and furnishings. We are also kid-friendly with a closet full of toys and books. Furthermore, your parking place is conveniently located just outside your door, with enough room for two guest cars in the driveway.

Guest access
The entire downstairs apartment is yours to use for the entire stay--2 spacious rooms and bathroom. With a separate outside entrance and push-button Smart Lock on the door, you are entirely independent unless you need our assistance. Also, you have a parking place that is literally a few feet from the door!

Other things to note
While we do not serve breakfast, we provide various coffees, hot teas, and hot chocolate for you to enjoy. There is also a little basket of snacks: nuts, power bars, granola bars, etc. Each party is also provided with a plate of fresh-baked chocolate chip pumpkin muffins. We also have limited kitchen utensils for making mixed drinks and an ice maker. BYOB!

The beds are as follows: one king-size bed in the bedroom, plus a daybed with a trundle bed underneath in the common room. The daybed and trundle are twin size single beds.

Our airbnb is officially registered with a Homestay permit issued by the City of Asheville Office of Permits and Applications. It has been inspected and found to comply with all regulations thereof. Further information is available on request.

Finally, we have a book chock full of info on restaurants, breweries, destinations, outdoor adventures, cultural sites, etc, etc, to help you make the most of our wonderful city...

listing_name: Private Asheville Home with Hot Tub and Game Room
description:
Meadow Run Falls | Asheville Vacation Rental with Hot Tub, Game Room + Private Water Feature, 10 Minutes to Downtown

The space
Meadow Run Falls is a modern Asheville bungalow made for easy, memorable stays—close to downtown, but tucked into a quiet neighborhood with mature landscaping for privacy. Start your mornings on the deck with coffee and the soothing sound of the backyard water feature, spend your afternoons exploring Asheville and the Blue Ridge, and end your nights in the hot tub or around the fire pit. With 3 king bedrooms, 3 full baths, and fun bonus spaces like a barn-style game room and a game shed with foosball, this home is ideal for couples traveling together, families, and friend groups.

What you’ll Love
* 10 minutes to Downtown Asheville and 10 minutes to Weaverville
* Private hot tub for relaxing after hiking, breweries, or a day downtown
* Fire pit for cozy evenings and stargazing
* Peaceful backyard water feature with “waterfall” vibes
* 3 king bedrooms plus 3 full bathrooms (privacy for everyone)
* Barn game room and game shed for extra hangout space
* REME Halo UV air purifier installed for enhanced air-quality support
* Easy access via paved, well-maintained roads

Home Features
* 3 bedrooms | 3 full bathrooms
* King bed in each bedroom
* Great room for gathering and downtime
* Spacious kitchen plus dining area for meals at home
* Eclectic furnishings and artwork with a local feel
* Layout that works well for couples, families, or mixed groups

Outdoor Features
* Private hot tub area
* Fire pit for evening hangs
* Game shed with TV and foosball table
* Multiple outdoor spaces (porches, decks, patios)
* Landscaped yard with mature greenery for privacy
* Patio/pond/water-feature area with relaxing nature sounds

Event Friendly
* Event friendly for up to 50 guests
* 3-night booking required for events
* Additional fees apply; ask our team for details before booking

Practical Details
* Occupancy: Sleeps in beds 6 | Max occupancy 8
* Linens provided for all beds; additional sleeping arrangements require guests to bring their own linens
* Located within Asheville city limits in a small residential neighborhood
* Internet speed: Upload 84.2 Mbps | Download 10.4 Mbps
* Uber and taxis are readily available for downtown outings

Location Highlights
* 10 minutes → Downtown Asheville
* 10 minutes → Downtown Weaverville
* 20 minutes → Biltmore Estate
* 25 minutes → Asheville Regional Airport
* Short drive → Blue Ridge Parkway

If you’re looking for an Asheville stay that’s close to everything but still feels like a private retreat, Meadow Run Falls delivers—hot tub, fire pit, game spaces, and peaceful outdoor living included.

⭐ Yonder Policies & Information

Cleaning Fee & Clean Guarantee
Yonder is committed to full transparency. All cleaning fees are clearly disclosed and backed by our **100% Clean Guarantee**. Reach out to our Guest Experience Team for further details.

Check-In / Check-Out
Check in is at 4pm and check out is at 10am. We’re happy to review early and late check requests and will do our best to accommodate. While early check-in or late check-out can’t be guaranteed, we always make every effort to honor these requests when availability allows. Paid options may be available.

Pets
Many of our guests have allergies, so we have maintained a pet-free environment so they can enjoy their vacation without the potential of an allergic reaction. If you have a pet, we are happy to recommend some alternatives nearby in our 'Pet Friendly Home' collection.

Quiet Policy
This home is located in a peaceful, private mountain community. To preserve the relaxing setting for everyone, please keep noise to a respectful level at all times. Parties and disruptive behavior aren’t permitted, and we kindly ask that you be mindful of neighbors and quiet hours starting at 10pm.

Extended Stays
Reservations of 28+ days are subject to additional review. Stays exceeding 90 days require a separate agreement. Security deposit, mid stay cleaning fee and trash pick up fees may apply depending on the length of stay.

Airbnb Strict 60-Day Cancellation Policy
Cancel 61+ days before check-in: 50% refund of the nightly rate + full cleaning fee (Airbnb service fee is non-refundable).
Cancel within 60 days of check-in: non-refundable.

Military Discount
We proudly offer a 5% discount to active duty military members and veterans. Proper documentation is required. Reach out to our Guest Experience Team for details.

Last-Minute Booking Verification
For reservations made **within 7 days of arrival**, additional verification is required to protect our homeowners and guests.
This includes:
* A clear photo of a government-issued ID
* A full facial selfie of the primary guest holding that ID (must match the reservation name)

Please note: Last-minute bookings made within 7 days of check-in are limited to a maximum stay of 28 days. Reservations exceeding 28 days are not permitted under this booking window.
Failure to complete verification may result in cancellation.

listing_name: The Snookmore ~ Front Porch Views w/ Hot Tub
description:
The Snookmore is perfectly located just 3 miles from the Blue Ridge Parkway and 8 miles from downtown Asheville. Just hop on the Parkway and have the Appalachian wilderness at your beck and call or mosey on down to the hottest town the South has to offer.

Its only neighbors are ourselves and our other rental house, the Snookery.

Note on Helene: we were very luck in Snookville with a lot of downed trees, but nothing structural. There are still outages, but the generators keep the power on.

The space
Nestled in the southern tip of Snookville, the Snookmore is designed for front porch rocking. With the Blue Ridge Mountains peaking through the treetops and the community garden just a stone's throw away, all you'll need is a iced beverage of your choosing and life will slow right on down.

The house itself is both cozy and has room to spread out. Newly constructed in 2107, it has a fully equipped kitchen for the gourmet chef, the option of a Keurig, Coffee maker or hot tea pot for the morning haze, and both a dining room and back porch dining table for any meal setting you please. Also on the back porch you'll find a grill for the vacation cookout and a hot tub for the end of the day wind down. Up on the second floor, there's another porch off both bedrooms that's nestled into the Carolina woods. Down on the ground level, there's room to relax and play with a carved out nook for darts as well as a foosball table and big screen TV. With Roku installed and free Netflix, it's perfect for that rainy day movie. Top all that off with a fire pit for late night s'mores roasting, and you've got the perfect home base for your Appalachian adventure. The only trick will be leaving the Snookmore!

You will have the whole house to yourself as well as access to the community garden, which has two picnic tables, a sandbox and a \tower\" clubhouse with climbing walls for the little ones.

listing_name: The Snookery ~ Refuge a Mountain w/ Hot Tub
description:
The Snookery is a true refuge. Perched on the mountainside, its back deck has views from the hot tub, making it the perfect place for a safe, memorable gathering.

Its only neighbors are us and another rental (The Snookmore), and we all have plenty of space to call our own. Do not hesitate to reach out with further questions!

Note on Helene: we were very luck in Snookville with a lot of downed trees, but nothing structural. There are still outages, but the generators keep the power on.

The space
Perched on the mountainside, the Snookery has two back decks with views of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Designed to sleep up to 12 comfortably, the Snookery affords large groups a place to convene, but can also provide an intimate stay.

Newly constructed in 2107, it has a fully equipped kitchen for the gourmet chef, the option of a Keurig, Coffee maker or hot tea pot for the morning haze, and both a dining room and back porch dining table for any meal setting you please. Also on the back deck you'll find a grill for the vacation cookout and a hot tub for the end of the day wind down. Down on the bottom level, there's room to relax and play with a foosball table, a big screen TV (with Roku and free Netflix) and another porch with obligatory rocking chairs. Just off the lower porch, there's a fire pit with plenty of firewood. Top all that off with brand new mattresses and plentiful pillows to lay your head, and you've got the perfect home base for your Appalachian adventure. The only trick will be leaving the Snookery!

** Newly installed backup generators. Never be left the dark again!

Guest access
There is access to the entire house as well as a community garden with a picnic table, a sandbox and clubhouse \tower\" with climbing walls for the little ones.

Other things to note
The kitchen if fully equipped with the tools to make any meal. All linens and paper products are provided
