listing_name: Minimum 21 day rental in lovely Grove Park
description:
Spacious light filled upstairs bedroom with a hall bathroom. Private 1912 Arts and Crafts house in North Asheville close to Grove Park Inn and downtown. Kitchen and porch also open to guest. 21 day minimum stay available.

The space
I'm particularly interested in renting to a person looking for an extended stay vacation rental or someone in the visiting nurse program, a student, new to Asheville or someone looking for temporary housing. I do have this room listed separately for short term rental less than 21 days . This listing is JUST for 21 days or more.

Guest access
Guest have access to the kitchen and porch as well as a washer/dryer. Parking is on street parking in front of the house.

Other things to note
The house is in a lovely North Asheville neighborhood about 1.5 miles from downtown and .75 miles from the Grove Park Inn. Mission Hospital is 3 miles away. There are 7 restaurants, 2 bakeries, a butcher, 3 coffee shops, an ice cream shop and 2 playgrounds in easy walking distance. There is a Trader Joe's, Whole Foods and Harris Teeter less than a mile from the house. This is a very convenient location to most anything in Asheville.

listing_name: Private Montford Guest Suite + Deck. Walk Downtown
description:
Tucked into Asheville’s quiet Historic Montford neighborhood, this private guest suite offers a peaceful, light-filled stay just a 10-minute walk from downtown. With its own separate entrance and private deck, it’s a lovely place to come home to after a day of exploring the city. Enjoy a queen memory foam bed, large rain shower, simple kitchenette, and free street parking in one of Asheville’s most charming neighborhoods.

The space
This private lower-level guest suite has its own entrance, lots of natural light, and a peaceful, tucked-away feel, with no access to the upper floors where we live. Designed for comfort and simplicity, the space is clean, modern, and welcoming, with original artwork, locally crafted Ash wood details, and a calm, uncluttered style. Enjoy a spacious walk-in shower with rain head and hand wand, and unwind on the private deck beneath mature oak trees. It’s a quiet, comfortable retreat just minutes from downtown Asheville.

Guest access
Guests have access to their own private space with a separate entrance, plus easy self check-in and check-out. Your lockbox code will be provided for the duration of your stay. At checkout, just leave the key in the lockbox and take any trash to the bins by the street.

Other things to note
This is our home, and we live on the two floors above the guest suite, so you may occasionally hear faint everyday sounds such as footsteps or our dog — nothing loud or excessive. We keep things very quiet and have acquired near-ninja-level skills.

Smoking is permitted on the private outdoor deck only; please ask for an ashtray to help keep the property clean.

Families are welcome. Children under 5 stay free when guests bring their own portable crib, bed, or pack-and-play.

listing_name: Cozy 2BR w/ Fireplace 5 Points Gem 1.2 mi 2 Dwntwn
description:
Welcome to your cozy retreat! This charming 2-bedroom, 1-bath home is ideal for families, business travelers, or weekend getaways. With a fireplace and a convenient kitchenette, you’ll have everything you need for a comfortable, relaxing stay.

Two spacious bedrooms with 2 kings and a queen pullout for extra guests—this unit comfortably sleeps up to 6.

Free Wi-Fi, Smart TV, and workspace for remote work

On-site parking

Quiet neighborhood, minutes from downtown Asheville, dining, and shopping

The space
This amazing remodeled home blends a rustic flair of Asheville Pine flooring and natural wood backsplash with modern furniture and decor. 12ft. barn wood sliding double-doors and beautiful bright colors. Plus our bonus amenities are sure to please!

You’ll enjoy spacious rooms over 20’ long and all the amenities you can want for your stay. Enjoy waking up to a view of the Pisgah mountains in the morning with your coffee, tea or nightcap.

We offer a wet bar stocked with Keurig tea and coffee, chocolate, granola bars & assorted snacks. Plus, a microwave & toaster oven ready for you to use on your vacation.

Thankfully, we support an eco-friendly environment, so we offer non-disposable utensils and kid-friendly shatterproof glass. Gorgeous tile-work accentuates the lavatory complete with complimentary salon brand bath products.

You'll be within a few walking minutes from Downtown Asheville, and a short drive to the all-new Art District, with easy access to the interstate and many of Asheville’s local attractions.

Guest access
This space features a completely private entrance and exclusive access to your own area. The SmartLock door allows for easy, self-guided check-in and check-out. You’ll also have a dedicated driveway spot, so you can park and walk straight in, with additional street parking available if needed.

Other things to note
Tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac just under 5 minutes from downtown Asheville, this private lower-level apartment offers both convenience and comfort. You’ll have your own separate entrance, making it a fully independent basement suite within our home, while still having someone on-site if needed.

For smooth self-check-in and added security, exterior video surveillance is in place at the front door. We respect your privacy but are always just a message away if you need anything during your stay.
